portfolio.description: Discover some of the projects I've developed, always seeking innovation and exceptional results

aero.title: AERO – Planning at the Speed of Thought
aero.description: How I designed and developed a keyboard-first project management ecosystem focused on eliminating friction between idea and execution.
aero.fullDescription: Development of a modern and highly optimized website for an agency specialized in web design and automation. The process included detailed user research, competitive analysis, wireframe construction, impactful visual design, and technical implementation, ensuring a digital presence that attracts and converts.
aero.challenge: The main challenge was to create not just a tool, but an 'Operating System' for work, where the interface disappears and only execution remains.
aero.solution: A clean and modern design, with strategically positioned sections to guide the user through the services offered by Agência Ignis Lab.
results: 60% increase in average time on page
25% growth in services in the first month

dai.title: Landing Page - Dra Dai Xavier
dai.description: Strategic and elegant Landing Page developed for Dr. Dai Xavier, focused on converting visitors into patients.
dai.fullDescription: Development of a premium Landing Page for Dr. Dai Xavier. The project focused on creating a welcoming and professional user experience, using neurodesign principles to convey trust and authority.
dai.challenge: The main challenge was to create a landing page that broke away from the generic look of clinics and offices. It was necessary to convey Dr. Dai Xavier's technical authority and refinement in facial harmonization, while maintaining a welcoming approach that generated immediate trust in potential patients.
dai.solution: The solution involved creating a unique design focused on 'Neurodesign' and color psychology, using sober tones and visual elements that evoke elegance and security. We implemented an optimized conversion flow, from the first visual impact to the strategic scheduling button via WhatsApp.
results: 50% increase in online scheduling rate within the first month
Optimized mobile experience with 100% Lighthouse score
Drastic reduction in recurring patient doubts due to clear information
Strengthening of personal brand and perception of premium value

nova_era.title: Nova Era Transportes
nova_era.description: Strategic institutional website for Nova Era Transportes, focused on logistics and freight.
nova_era.fullDescription: Development of a modern and functional website for Nova Era Transportes. The focus was to present logistics and freight services clearly, facilitating contact for quotes and highlighting the fleet and company experience.
nova_era.challenge: The main challenge was to digitize a company with nearly 30 years of tradition, creating a bridge between its solid history and the expectations of the modern corporate market. It was necessary to convey safety, punctuality, and robustness, facilitating the flow of quotes for large companies and events.
nova_era.solution: I developed a platform focused on usability and performance, with an information architecture that highlights fleet differentials and service capillarity. We implemented a direct conversion funnel to WhatsApp and personalized forms, in addition to a visual strategy that uses gray and magenta to convey innovation in the transport sector.
results: Significant increase in corporate lead conversion through the site
Reduction in average response time for freight quotes
Interface optimized for mobile devices (100% responsiveness)
Improved organic ranking for logistics terms in the Vinhedo region

hero.role: UX/UI Designer | Web Designer | Product Designer
hero.description: Transforming ideas into impactful and efficient digital experiences

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.p1: Hi! I'm <1>Lucas</1>, a Web Designer passionate about transforming ideas into impactful and efficient digital experiences. With a degree in <1>Graphic Design</1>, post-graduate studies in <1>UX/UI Design</1>, and an <1>MBA in Digital Marketing</1>, my expertise extends to Automation Management and AI Chatbot development, with proficiency in leading platforms like n8n and Make.
about.p2: My mission is to create web solutions that not only look stunning but also optimize processes, generate tangible results, and boost business efficiency. I dive deep into every project, from conceiving intuitive interfaces (UI) to Search Engine Optimization (SEO), always seeking innovation and the latest market trends to deliver robust and functional solutions.
about.p3: I'm always open to exchange ideas, discuss exciting projects, and maybe create something amazing together!

footer.description: Web Designer specialist in automation, UX/UI and digital process optimization. Transforming ideas into impactful digital experiences.
footer.made_with: Developed with passion, technology and coffee.

hero.title: Planning at the Speed of Thought
hero.subtitle: How I designed and developed a <1>keyboard-first</1> project management ecosystem focused on eliminating friction between idea and execution.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.quote: "Why does the world need another project manager?"
challenge.p1: This was the question that guided the start of AERO. I noticed a frustrating pattern in market tools: they are slow, bloated, and require many clicks for simple actions.
challenge.p2: For high-performance teams, every second of loading and every context switch (mouse vs. keyboard) is a break in the "Flow State".
challenge.mission_desc: To create not just a tool, but an "Operating System" for work, where the interface disappears and only execution remains.

discovery.title: Discovery and Immersion
discovery.desc: To define the product, I mapped the needs of two critical personas in software teams, identifying their mental models and latent pains.

odair.name: Odair
odair.pain: Hates taking hands off the keyboard. Feels that visual forms are slow.
odair.need: Instant speed (<100ms), global shortcuts, and dark mode.

mariana.name: Mariana
mariana.pain: Loses macro context when diving into task details.
mariana.need: Systemic vision (Kanban) without losing the ability to document complex specs.

command_menu.title: Command Menu
command_menu.desc: The challenge was to combine task management (structured) with documentation (freeform). I created a navigation where the menu acts as a "teleportation" tool. The user doesn't navigate hierarchically; they jump directly to where they need to be.

context_dilemma.title: The Context Dilemma
context_dilemma.problem_desc: When clicking a card, going to a new page made the user lose track of the "whole" (the Sprint).
context_dilemma.solution_desc: I implemented a Drawer. The PM can read the spec on the right while still visualising the bottleneck in the "In Progress" column on the left.

visual_semantics.title: Visual Semantics
visual_semantics.desc: Tools that are too colorful compete for attention. In AERO, color is used only for signaling. This reduces cognitive load, allowing the brain to ignore structure and focus on content.

engineering.title: Engineering & Implementation
engineering.desc: As a "Product Engineer", I didn't stop at the prototype. I took AERO to production using a modern stack.

bubble_menu.title: Challenge: Bubble Menu
bubble_menu.desc: Implementing the floating menu in the text editor. I calculated coordinates relative to the user's text selection to render the menu contextually.

a11y.title: Accessibility (A11y)
a11y.desc: I ensured visible Focus Rings and WCAG AAA contrast (Ratio 13.6:1) for text (#f5f5f5 over #1D1F26).

results.title: Results and Learnings

doc.title: Documentation is Life
doc.desc: Creating the PRD and Design System before coding saved weeks of refactoring. Clarity on "what to build" allowed "how to build" to flow.

simplicity.title: Complexity of Simple
simplicity.desc: Making a text input seem "simple" and "magical" requires complex engineering of <1>states</1> and <1>events</1> behind the scenes. Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.

results.quote: AERO is proof that work tools don't have to be boring or slow.
